title: CastLib
description: A library that assists with long-range spell casting.
body:
This mod is a library dependency of **[ArsArms](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsarms)**.

Supports long‑distance casting of **[Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)** spells.

CastLib is a library mod which adds shared common code that mumu17's mods use, this mod provides nothing of value without another mod activating it or using it.
